title: Writing a Basic SQL Update Query
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a simple SQL update query (e.g., 'UPDATE table_name SET column_name = value') based on a given database schema (e.g., 'users', 'orders') and a specific update requirement (e.g., 'update the user name').
constraints: Must use the SQL UPDATE statement

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the generated query follows proper SQL syntax.
Check if the generated query adheres to the SQL statement and table name constraints.
Evaluate if the generated query is effective for updating desired data.
